request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded preparedness programs leave communities vulnerable. The 2023 national readiness report showed that only 32% of local emergency plans met federal standards. We can't afford to cut these programs - when disaster strikes, it's our families who pay the price. #CivilDefenseMatters
